title: Dhammapada — Auswahl

description: Mind is the forerunner of all actions. All deeds are led by mind, created by mind.

title: Also sprach Zarathustra — Auswahl
author: Friedrich Nietzsche
description: Drei Verwandlungen nenne ich euch des Geistes: wie der Geist zum Kamele wird, und zum Löwen das Kameel, und zum Kinde zuletzt der Löwe.

title: Gitanjali — Song Offerings
author: Rabindranath Tagore
description: Thou hast made me endless, such is thy pleasure. This frail vessel thou emptiest again and again, and fillest it ever with fresh life.
